visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Inside a warehouse-style retail store, two women stand in an aisle. The woman on the left wears a light pink short-sleeved top; the woman on the right wears a maroon off-shoulder top and a dark blue beret. They are holding folded blankets with cartoon character patterns (Snoopy/Peanuts). A large red and blue logo is overlaid at the top. (2) The camera zooms in closer to the women as they smile and gesture enthusiastically toward the blankets. The woman on the right holds a white blanket while the woman on the left holds a yellow one. (3) A close-up shot focuses on the texture of the white blanket. The women point to specific character illustrations on the fabric. (4) The women hold both blankets up side-by-side, comparing the yellow and white versions. The lighting is bright and even, typical of a large retail environment. (5) A brief cut shows the blankets stacked in a cardboard shipping box on a metal industrial shelf. (6) The camera returns to the two women who continue talking and gesturing toward the camera, expressing excitement through wide smiles and hand movements.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: Costco WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 努比努比. (2) [Subtitle]: 難怪剛上架快要被搶完. (3) [Slogan]: 359元 送禮不傷荷包. [Subtitle]: 史努比雙人毯. (4) [Subtitle]: 152*177cm. (5) [Subtitle]: 最重要是它可以機洗 所以用髒不用擔心. (6) [Variety]: 很有質感. (7) [Slogan]: 入手毯毯了 只要359元. (8) [Variety]: 哇！難怪. (9) [Variety]: 買不到. [Variety]: 手慢無手慢無.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: Two main female creators are the only people clearly visible in the frame.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a light pink top. The second woman has shorter dark hair, wears a blue beret and a maroon off-shoulder top.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A warehouse interior with high ceilings, industrial metal shelving units filled with various packaged household goods, and bright overhead lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-arousal female voices shout 'Noo-bi Noo-bi' over an upbeat, major-key electronic pop BGM with a strong four-on-the-floor beat. (2) A clear, energetic female narration begins at a rapid speech rate, maintaining a bright spectral centroid. (3) A distinct 'Ding' sound effect rings out as price information is verbally introduced. (4) Faint fabric rustling sounds are heard as the product is physically manipulated. (5) A 'Pop' sound effect triggers alongside a shift in the speaker's pitch to emphasize product features. (6) The main narrator's voice overlaps with a secondary female voice in a supportive, conversational dynamic. (7) Final enthusiastic sign-off vocal occurs before the music swells and reaches a hard cut conclusion.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Feature Presentation -> Price Justification -> Call to Action.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To generate consumer interest and drive immediate sales for the Peanuts-branded Snoopy blankets available at Costco. The video uses high-energy delivery and clear price-value propositions to appeal to fans of the character and budget-conscious shoppers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear identification of the retail location (Costco), display of product price, and direct recommendation to buy the item.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The highly synchronized use of variety-show style text overlays and sound effects suggests a standard social-media marketing format designed for high engagement.
